approach.price_safety: unsupervised IsolationForest on category-normalised price (no label).

price_anomaly.approach: unsupervised anomaly detection on category-normalised price (no price label used)
price_anomaly.reason: No supervised price label is used in training; nothing to reconstruct.

why_leakage_free: No model is trained on the v2 weak labels (which were functions of the features). Price uses unsupervised anomaly detection; seller/policy use rules.
